knownPatterns.title: vue-i18n v10 @ 字符导致 SSR 500
knownPatterns.description: i18n JSON 翻译文本中的 @ 字符被 vue-i18n v10 消息编译器解析为 linked message 起始符，文本如 MΩ@500V 导致 SyntaxError: code 10 → 页面 500
knownPatterns.fix: 将 @ 替换为括号等价表述，如 MΩ@500V → MΩ（500V 测试）

knownPatterns.title: L1/L2 JSON slug 使用旧缩写导致 404
knownPatterns.description: power.json 和 L2 JSON 中 cat{N}Slug 使用早期缩写(pv-/roof-/wind-/td-/ess-/hydro-)而非全名(solar-farm-/rooftop-solar-/wind-turbine-/transmission-/energy-storage-/hydropower-) → L1→L2→L3 链接全部 404
knownPatterns.detection: 检查每个 L2 JSON 的 cat{N}Slug 最后一段是否为实际存在的 L3 目录名
knownPatterns.fix: 将 cat{N}Slug 从缩写前缀替换为全名前缀，中英文版本同步

knownPatterns.title: L4 JSON 文件放错 L3 目录
knownPatterns.description: L4 JSON 文件物理位置与 parentName 字段指向的 L3 分类不一致，导致 autoChildren API 在错误的 L3 页面上渲染多余的 L4 卡片
knownPatterns.detection: 检查每个 L4 JSON 的 parentName 是否与其所在 L3 目录名语义一致
knownPatterns.fix: 将文件移动到正确的 L3 目录
knownPatterns.autoCheck: python3 -c "import json,glob;..." 比对各L4 JSON的parentName与实际目录

knownPatterns.title: L2 JSON 文件缺失导致页面空白
knownPatterns.description: 新建 L2 场景后遗漏创建对应的 {l2}.json，导致 L2 页面组件加载不到 i18n 数据，l2Catalog 为空数组 → 所有内容区块被 v-if 跳过 → 页面空白
knownPatterns.detection: 检查每个 L2 目录下是否有同名的 .json 文件，且包含 cat{N}Name 目录数据
knownPatterns.fix: 参考已有 L2 JSON 模板创建新文件，填入对应 L3 品类的目录条目
knownPatterns.autoCheck: for l2 in discovered L2 dirs: verify {l2}.json exists and has cat1Name

knownPatterns.title: cat slug 含 /l4/ 路径段导致 500
knownPatterns.description: L3 JSON 的 cat{N}Slug 值错误包含 /l4/ 路径段(如 industries/power/hydropower/l4/xxx)，生成的路由 URL 不匹配任何 Nuxt 页面模板 → 500
knownPatterns.fix: 将 /l4/ 替换为实际的 L3 目录名

knownPatterns.title: ogTitle field-level translation gap — Chinese product names left in SEO ogTitle
knownPatterns.description: ogTitle field is frequently missed during bulk translation. Pattern: product name (Chinese) + " — LightingMetal" instead of translated name. Affected 64 en, 71 es, 28 ru pages.
knownPatterns.fix: Add ogTitle to translation checklist. Post-translation audit should scan ogTitle specifically.

knownPatterns.title: hero.alt image alt text translation gap
knownPatterns.description: hero.alt (image alt text) carrying Chinese product descriptions in non-zh pages. Same pattern as ogTitle. Affected en:31, ru:29 pages.
knownPatterns.fix: Add hero.alt to translation checklist with ogTitle.

knownPatterns.title: Full language missing — translation pipeline never executed for fr
knownPatterns.description: Entire French language has 0 MongoDB documents. Translation pipeline was never built or executed for fr. All 821 zh pages need French translations.
knownPatterns.fix: Run AI batch translation of all 821 zh pages to fr using DeepSeek API.
